name: First Data Corporation
description: First Data Corporation was a global leader in commerce-enabling technology and solutions, serving approximately six million business locations and thousands of financial institutions in more than 100 countries. The company provided merchant transaction processing services, credit, debit, private-label, gift, and other prepaid card offerings, as well as mobile connectivity and security solutions. In 2019, First Data Corporation was acquired by Fiserv, Inc., combining the two companies to create one of the world's leading providers of payments and financial technology.
